win_condition: Village team wins if at least one werewolf is eliminated; werewolf team wins if no werewolf is eliminated. Special role win conditions apply when present.
tiebreaker: If no elimination occurs, resolve by role rules (e.g., Tanner may win alone). For session tracking, count team win as primary metric.

categories.label: Village Team Wins
categories.description: Number of rounds won by village-aligned players.

categories.label: Werewolf Team Wins
categories.description: Number of rounds won by werewolf-aligned players.

categories.label: Special Role Solo Wins
categories.description: Optional tracker for roles with unique win conditions (e.g., Tanner).
